# FileShrinkr
> Free online image compression and editing at https://fileshrinkr.com

## Summary
FileShrinkr compresses and edits images in the browser and on the server. Browser (private) mode runs JPG, WEBP, AVIF, and PNG compression locally. Server mode handles HEIC, PDF, EXIF removal, and MozJPEG JPG. The editor (crop, resize, rotate, flip) runs client-side with HTML5 Canvas.

## Primary URL
- https://fileshrinkr.com/

## Features
- Upload: JPG, PNG, WEBP, HEIC, SVG
- Output: JPG, WEBP, AVIF, PNG, PDF
- Target file size presets: 20 KB, 100 KB, 500 KB (government and exam form uploads)
- Resize and crop for online application forms (custom W×H, passport-style photos)
- Resize presets: Instagram 1080², Facebook 1200×630, YouTube 1280×720; custom cover crop
- Browser-private compression mode (no upload for supported raster formats)
- Batch upload; ZIP download for multiple files
- Merge images into one PDF; optional lossless PDF (img2pdf)
- Before/after compression preview
- Editor → compressor handoff
- Remove EXIF (server mode, JPG/WEBP/AVIF)

## API
- POST /compress — multipart form upload; returns JSON with download_url
- GET /static/{filename} — download compressed output
- GET /ads.txt — Google AdSense authorized sellers

## Tech stack
- Backend: Python Flask, Pillow, pillow-heif, img2pdf (optional MozJPEG)
- Frontend: HTML, Tailwind CSS, vanilla JavaScript, JSZip
- Deployment: Docker on port 3000

## Publisher
DSnM Solutions

## Guides
- https://fileshrinkr.com/guides/resize-photos-for-government-exam-forms
- Sitemap: https://fileshrinkr.com/sitemap.xml
- Robots: https://fileshrinkr.com/robots.txt
